title: Product Launch Presentation

segments.text: Thank you all for joining us today.
We're excited to introduce our new line of wireless earbuds.
They feature active noise cancellation, eight hours of battery life, and seamless Bluetooth pairing with all major devices.
They will retail at one hundred and forty nine dollars and will be available in three colors starting next month.
Pre-orders begin today on our website.

transcript: Thank you all for joining us today. We're excited to introduce our new line of wireless earbuds. They feature active noise cancellation, eight hours of battery life, and seamless Bluetooth pairing with all major devices. They will retail at one hundred and forty nine dollars and will be available in three colors starting next month. Pre-orders begin today on our website.
